name: Carnis Abyss: The Devouring Labyrinth
raw_description: A twisted, flesh-and-bone labyrinth inside the stomach of a sleeping eldritch god, swarming with parasitic worms and twisted digestive demons.
description:
**The Setting Name:** "Carnis Abyss" - The Devouring Labyrinth

**Visual Style & Atmosphere:** Carnis Abyss is a twisted, nightmarish realm that embodies a grotesque fusion of organic and hellish elements. The art direction leans towards a dark, visceral Gothic Horror style with an emphasis on fleshy textures, bulging veins, and pulsing, bioluminescent growths. Walls and floors are composed of a mass of living, quivering tissue, exuding a perpetual stench of rot and acidic digestive fluids. The sky is a sickly shade of greenish-yellow, reminiscent of bile, and seems to writhe and twist like a living entity.

The lighting in Carnis Abyss is dim and eerie, with flickering, candle-like flames that seem to burn with an otherworldly energy. Shadows writhe and twist across the walls, taking on macabre forms that seem to move of their own accord. The ambient noise is a cacophony of gurgling, churning, and screeching, punctuated by the distant, thunderous growls of the eldritch god that slumbers above.

**The Lore:** Carnis Abyss was born from the slumbering digestive system of Zha'thik, an ancient, eldritch deity said to have consumed worlds and civilizations with a mere thought. As Zha'thik sleeps, its stomach churns and convulses, birthing a labyrinthine nightmare that serves as a prison for the god's countless digestive demons and parasitic worms. These creatures swarm through the labyrinth, feeding on the flesh and souls of any who dare to enter.

The history of Carnis Abyss is one of unending torment and suffering. Many brave adventurers have entered the labyrinth seeking fortune, knowledge, or simply to prove their worth. Few have returned, and those who do are often changed, their minds shattered by the horrors they witnessed within. The whispers of those who have ventured into Carnis Abyss speak of an otherworldly corruption that seeps into the very fabric of reality, tempting adventurers with promises of forbidden knowledge and eldritch power.

**The Core Conflict:** The corruption that controls Carnis Abyss is the manifestation of Zha'thik's digestive system, fueled by the god's dark energy. This energy, known as "The Devouring," seeps through every aspect of the labyrinth, animating the twisted creatures that inhabit it. The Devouring is a constant, corrosive force that wears down the resolve and sanity of those who dare to explore Carnis Abyss.

At the heart of this corruption is the Overworm, a gargantuan, parasitic creature that serves as Zha'thik's digestive system's primary enforcer. The Overworm seeks to claim the souls of all who enter the labyrinth, using them to satiate Zha'thik's eternal hunger. As adventurers navigate the ever-shifting paths of Carnis Abyss, they must contend with the Overworm's minions, twisted digestive demons, and the labyrinth's own sadistic, adaptive mechanisms, all while resisting the insidious influence of The Devouring.

In Carnis Abyss, death is not the only fate worse than death. Those who succumb to The Devouring risk becoming part of the labyrinth itself, their essence trapped in an eternal cycle of torment, fueling the Overworm's power and Zha'thik's slumbering malevolence.

tile.name: cursed_warrior
tile.description: A once-noble warrior now twisted by dark forces

player.back_history: A former knight of the Order of the White Rose, Sir Valoric was accused of heresy and cast out after a mysterious affliction began to warp his body and mind. Seeking redemption and a cure for his corruption, he ventures into Carnis Abyss, driven by a burning need to prove his innocence and find a way to reverse the dark transformations consuming him.

tile.name: Echo_of_Eldrid
tile.description: A crystalline shard pulsing with a faint, blue-green light, as if it contains the essence of a dying star.

final_objective.back_history: The Echo of Eldrid is a remnant of the last mortal king who dared to challenge Zha'thik's power. Eldrid, a just and righteous ruler, discovered that the only way to stop The Devouring was to shatter the Overworm's hold on the labyrinth. Using ancient knowledge, Eldrid created the Echo, a focus of his people's collective soul and willpower. As he descended into Carnis Abyss to confront the Overworm, Eldrid infused his essence into the Echo, imbuing it with the power to resist The Devouring. Though Eldrid was consumed by the labyrinth, his Echo remained, waiting for a worthy adventurer to claim it and use its power to break the Overworm's hold on Carnis Abyss, thus ending the corruption that has plagued the realm.

tile_with_texture.name: Echo_of_Eldrid
tile_with_texture.description: A crystalline shard pulsing with a faint, blue-green light, as if it contains the essence of a dying star.
